```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.7em;">single biggest behavioral lever</div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.4em;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:0.95em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;text-align:center;min-width:5em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-top:0.1em;">Plan mode</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;text-align:center;min-width:5em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-top:0.1em;">Write plan</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;text-align:center;min-width:5em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;margin-top:0.1em;">Agree</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;">→</span>

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C8475,#3DA18A);color:#F8F7F0;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.7em;text-align:center;min-width:5em;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,132,117,0.3);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#A9D7C5;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">04</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;margin-top:0.1em;">Build</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #D45F47;border-radius:12px;padding:0.65em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);">
  <div style="width:2em;height:2em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D45F47,#B5476A);color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;flex-shrink:0;">!</div>
  <div style="text-align:left;font-size:0.6em;color:#7A2418;line-height:1.45;">
   Sideways? <strong>STOP. Re-plan.</strong>
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
